codeReview.summary: Implementation covers all 5 feature requirements: Miri installed, full suite run (25 files/580 tests), incompatible tests documented with #[cfg_attr(miri, ignore)], zero kernel UB found (nothing to TDD-fix), findings documented in commit message. The diff is clean: 3 files changed, 48 insertions, 4 deletions. buddy.rs gets 1 ignore annotation, ipc.rs gets 24 ignore annotations with module-level doc comment, scheduler_state.rs gets cfg-gated iteration reduction. Final results: 555 Miri-clean, 0 failures, 25 documented ignores. Standard tests: 580 pass, 0 ignored.

issues.description: Doc comment says UB is 'triggered by every test' but 6-7 tests (slot_count_is_62, payload_size_is_60, message_size_is_64, message_alignment_is_64, message_new_zeroes_payload, message_from_payload_roundtrip, message_payload_small_struct) never create a RingBuf and would pass cleanly under Miri. The blanket sed-based annotation is overly broad. Practical impact is minimal (4-7 trivially-passing tests unnecessarily skipped under Miri) but the doc comment is inaccurate.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker's skillFeedback suggests documenting that 'cargo +nightly miri test exits on first UB per test binary — running per-file gives complete results across the suite.' This is a valid improvement to the kernel-auditor skill's Miri section, which currently says to run the blanket command but doesn't explain the per-file workaround for getting complete results.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.suggestedChanges[0]. Worker ran Miri per-file (25 separate runs) to get complete results, which the skill doesn't currently suggest.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The miri-compatibility.md library file was created/updated during or before this session with accurate compatibility data (330/348 originally, now 555/580 after fixes). The file should be updated to reflect the post-fix state: 555 pass, 25 ignored, scheduler_state optimized to ~10s.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/miri-compatibility.md still shows '330/348 tests pass' and 'scheduler_state: ~1400 seconds' — stale after this feature's changes.

summary: PASS. Miri UB detection feature fully implemented. Worker ran Miri on all 25 test files, found zero kernel UB, correctly annotated 25 incompatible tests (1 buddy provenance false-positive, 24 ipc out-of-scope UB), and optimized scheduler_state Miri runtime from ~1400s to ~10s with cfg-gated iteration reduction. All 580 standard tests unaffected. One non-blocking issue: blanket ignore on ipc.rs is slightly over-broad (6-7 constant/Message-only tests don't trigger the UB), but impact is negligible. Commit message is thorough and well-documented.
